recommendations.title: The Prophecy
recommendations.overview: The angel Gabriel comes to Earth to collect a soul which will end the stalemated war in Heaven. However, it is hidden inside of a Native American girl and only a former priest and a schoolteacher can stop him.

recommendations.title: Passion Play
recommendations.overview: An angel under the thumb of a ruthless gangster is saved by a trumpet player down on his luck.

recommendations.title: The Way He Looks
recommendations.overview: Leonardo is a blind teenager dealing with an overprotective mother while trying to live a more independent life. To the disappointment of his best friend, Giovana, he plans to go on an exchange program abroad. When Gabriel, a new student in town, arr

recommendations.title: The Prophecy 3: The Ascent
recommendations.overview: As the War in Heaven and on Earth rages on, Pyriel, the Angel of Genocide, rises to power, intending to destroy all of mankind. The only one who stands in his way is street preacher Danyael, who was born of an Angel and a woman, the nephilim.

recommendations.title: Gabriel
recommendations.overview: Gabriel tells the story of an archangel who fights to bring light back to purgatory - a place where darkness rules - and save the souls of the city's inhabitants.

recommendations.title: I Don't Want to Go Back Alone
recommendations.overview: The arrival of a new student in school changes Leonardo's life. This 15 year-old blind teenager has to deal with the jealousy of his friend Giovana while figuring out the new feelings he's having towards his new friend, Gabriel.

recommendations.title: Mojave
recommendations.overview: A suicidal artist goes into the desert, where he finds his doppelgänger, a homicidal drifter.

recommendations.title: Nekrotronic
recommendations.overview: A man discovers that he is part of a secret sect of magical beings who hunt down and destroy demons in the internet.

recommendations.title: The Crow: City of Angels
recommendations.overview: A murder victim is brought back to life by a mysterious crow. With the help of a beautiful woman, he exacts revenge on his killers – only to realize his enemy has discovered the one weakness that can destroy him forever.

recommendations.title: Good Fortune
recommendations.overview: A well-meaning but rather inept angel named Gabriel meddles in the lives of a struggling gig worker and a wealthy capitalist.
